title: phaseolus linearis var. coriaceus
intro: Phaseolus linearis var. coriaceus, also known as the Coriaceous Bush Bean, is a variety of the Phaseolus linearis plant, a type of vining bean native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The Coriaceous Bush Bean offers various health benefits, including lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood pressure, and aiding in digestion. It can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused into oil for topical application, or used in culinary dishes for its nutritional value.
